# Weight Loss Percentage

> Free, accurate weight loss percentage and health/fitness calculators including BMI, TDEE, BMR, macros, calories, body fat, protein, water intake, keto, and newborn weight loss.

## Calculators

- [Weight Loss Percentage Calculator](/calculators/weight-loss): % of body weight lost between two measurements. Formula: ((Start − Current) ÷ Start) × 100.
- [Newborn Weight Loss Calculator](/calculators/newborn-weight-loss): Pediatric weight-loss % with clinical thresholds (5% / 7% / 10%).
- [BMI Calculator](/calculators/bmi): Body Mass Index from height and weight.
- [BMR Calculator](/calculators/bmr): Basal Metabolic Rate using Mifflin–St Jeor.
- [TDEE Calculator](/calculators/tdee): Total Daily Energy Expenditure = BMR × activity multiplier.
- [Calorie Calculator](/calculators/calorie): Daily calorie targets for cut, maintain, or bulk.
- [Macro Calculator](/calculators/macro): Protein / carbs / fat split by goal.
- [Body Fat Calculator](/calculators/body-fat): US Navy method body fat %.
- [Protein Calculator](/calculators/protein): Grams of protein per kg/lb of body weight.
- [Water Intake Calculator](/calculators/water-intake): Daily hydration target.
- [Keto Calculator](/calculators/keto): Keto macro split (typically 70/25/5).
